title: Uncle Buck
starring: Bill Nighy, Ella Purnell, Daniel Radcliffe, Will Poulter
summary: When a reclusive millionaire known only as Uncle Buck dies, his relatives gather expecting a straightforward inheritance. Instead, Buck launches them into a weeks-long treasure hunt filled with cryptic questions, family rivalries, forgotten memories, and impossible choices, forcing them to reconnect with each other while uncovering the true purpose behind his fortune.
